from today's leadoff morning note if you
would like to review the analysis
supporting these conclusions and if you
need to make any changes in your
portfolio to remain on the right side of
Market risk you need to be a client of
42 macro so today's key macro question
is will Doge achieve significant deficit
reduction our answers are no we continue
to believe that DC and lago's addiction
to debt Finance growth will prevent Elon
Musk from achieving his goal of
significant deficit reduction we took a
lot of heat from poorly informed members
of the Elon Musk fan club when we
initially bulked at their original $2
trillion goal back in December with our
fluk with our friend Luke Roman Elon
Musk has since confirmed our early
datadriven skepticism we went on record
saying Doge will likely find 500 billion
to1 trillion in expenditure reductions
and that those cuts would be more than
offset by number one the per Anum double
digit growth of politically protected
categories like Social Security Medicare
and now Medicaid number two the1 billion
doll plus annual growth of net interest
as treasury debt matures and re and
refinanced into a higher interest rate
regime and number three the
multi-trillion dollar cost of extending
and expanding the tax cuts and jobs act
aka the Trump tax cuts all told while
the treasury bond market May it
temporarily bailed out by a deepening us
growth scare investors would be remiss
to overstay their welcome gold has
experienced a largely uninterrupted Bull
Run since the fall of 2023 due to the
aformentioned reasons congrats to 42
macro clients for all the money they've
made staying on the right side of bullan

American dream across Global Wall Street

elected and unelected officials get this
right the fourth turning debt clock is
ticking transitioning to our 42 macro

exactly what we do you know I'd say the
number one thing we do for our clients
certainly on the retail side of things
is making sure that they have the peace
of mind to sleep comfortably at night
you know like I said a couple days ago
our systems are not designed to buy the
exact bottom of any Market cycle or sell
the exact top what our systems are
optimized for is to sell the top once
it's been confirmed you know pretty
close to the top and buy the bottom once
it's close uh once it's been confirmed
pretty close to the bottom and if we do
that you know we generally you know
capture about 90% of any will run while
mitigating about 60% of any downside uh
uh from you know in terms of uh Market
crashes so you got a 90% upside capture
ratio with a 40% downside capture ratio
I don't know any retail investor that
has the capability of doing that on a
consistent basis by themselves and you
know certainly don't mean to be Majora
